class.name: InputHapticEffectLeftRight
class.brief_description: A haptic effect for direct control over high/low frequency motors.
class.description: A haptic effect for direct control over high/low frequency motors (with type of [constant InputHapticEffect.HAPTIC_EFFECT_LEFT_RIGHT]).

members.member: Control of the large controller motor (between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code]).
Control of the small controller motor (between [code]0.0[/code] and [code]1.0[/code]).
